title: Galarhoeus soongaricus
taxonomy: Galarhoeus soongaricus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Arumaceae. It is a genus of plants native to East Asia. The exact classification of this species within the Arumaceae family is still being researched and refined by botanists. However, Galarhoeus soongaricus is most commonly placed within the Arumaceae family and is often referred to as a member of the Asian arum group. Further studies are needed to fully understand its place within the plant kingdom.
